title: San Millán Z2 with Sprints
description: Z2 endurance with embedded 30s sprints — Almquist protocol
purpose: Enhanced fat oxidation stimulus via sprint additions to Z2 ride

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder than it needs to be.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. This is the foundation of all cycling fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Relax and enjoy the ride. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This feels like nothing. That's the point. Patience builds power, not suffering.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low intensity, high volume. Building your engine from the ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Consistency over intensity. Show up, do the work, repeat.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your friends are doing threshold intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 200% FTP. Alternating. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 200%, Cadence: 95-120 rpm, Position: Alternating. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2 is like compound interest. Boring, but it builds wealth over time.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2 work: conversational pace. You should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Endurance pace: where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. Your aerobic system is thanking you right now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. This is where champions are made in the off-season.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Easy miles make fast racing. Stop thinking and start pedaling.
